ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_number" INTEGER /* Order number */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applied promotion */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID or name of the user who created the order */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* ID or name of the user who last updated the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's primary address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product brand */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x10x10 cm) */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order item */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount for the order item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aisles" (
  "aisle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aisle */,
  "aisle_name" TEXT /* Name of the aisle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aisle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_departments" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_aisles" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "aisle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aisle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "aisle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID or name of the user who updated the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the promotion is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program member */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned */,
  "tier" TEXT /* Tier level (e.g., bronze, silver, gold) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program entry was last updated */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity (e.g., earning points, redeeming points) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
